calendar.matters:
Progress Report On Default/Time Payments - On Court'S Own Motion.
Off Calendar Mar-17-2017 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, September 1, 2016.
Yvette Pannell, Appellant/Defendant, Appears with her Attorney Ryan Knutson, Esq.
Ryan Knutson, Esq. (415-553-3408), for Appellant/Defendant Yvette Pannell.

Erik Metzger, Respondent/Plaintiff, Appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on calendar as assigned by Deptartment 206 for trial de novo.

Erik Metzger, testifies on his own behalf.

Exhibit 1.--A copy of the Rental Agreement.

Yvette Pannell, testifies on her behalf.

Exhibit No. A--Rental Agreement and House Rules.
Exhibit No. B--List of Relevant Text Messages, Beginning with Move-Out Date of Erik Metzger.
Exhibit No. C--Statement as to Mr. Metzger Re Notice of Termination of Tenancy

At the conclusion of the hearing, matter is taken under submission. Plaintiff's and Defendant's Exhibits are retained by the court.

After the hearing, Ryan Knutson, Attorney for Appellant/Defendant Yvette Pannell, filed an substitution of attorney in the clerks office in room 103.

Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze. Clerk: P. Natt. Not reported. D-525.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Judgment Entered
